Source   Edit  

Types

JpsSpace = JumpPointSpace
Source   Edit   
JumpPointSpace = ref object
  path*: PathSpace
  jumps*: seq[int]
  jumpMasks*: seq[uint8]
  blockedMasks*: seq[uint8]
A JPS+ path space with precomputed jump distances. Source   Edit   
PathMode = enum
  CardinalPath, DiagonalPath
Source   Edit   
PathSpace = ref object
  width*: int
  height*: int
  mode*: PathMode
  walkMask*: seq[bool]
  passableMask*: seq[bool]
A direct A-star path space over a passable grid. Source   Edit   
PathStep = object
  found*: bool
  x*: int
  y*: int
Source   Edit   
PathyError = object of CatchableError
Source   Edit   
TilePathSpace = ref object
  path*: PathSpace
  tileSize*: int
  width*: int
  height*: int
  nodes*: seq[PathStep]
  passableMask*: seq[bool]
A hybrid path space using coarse tiles and exact connectors. Source   Edit  

Consts

DefaultTileSize = 8
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc findJumpPath(jps: JumpPointSpace; startX, startY, goalX, goalY: int): seq[
    PathStep] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Finds a direct JPS+ path over precomputed jump edges. Source   Edit   
proc findPath(jps: JumpPointSpace; startX, startY, goalX, goalY: int): seq[
    PathStep] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Finds a path using JPS+ tables when diagonal movement is enabled. Source   Edit   
proc findPath(path: PathSpace; startX, startY, goalX, goalY: int): seq[PathStep] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Finds a complete A-star path between two points. Source   Edit   
proc findPath(tiles: TilePathSpace; startX, startY, goalX, goalY: int): seq[
    PathStep] {....raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Finds a hybrid tile path between two pixel points. Source   Edit   
proc findTilePath(tiles: TilePathSpace; startX, startY, goalX, goalY: int): seq[
    PathStep] {....raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Finds a hybrid path using pixel connectors and coarse tile A-star. Source   Edit   
proc firstPassable(path: PathSpace): PathStep {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the first passable point in map scan order. Source   Edit   
proc inBounds(path: PathSpace; x, y: int): bool {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns true when a point is inside the path grid. Source   Edit   
proc inBounds(tiles: TilePathSpace; x, y: int): bool {.inline, ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns true when a tile point is inside the tile grid. Source   Edit   
proc jumpDistance(jps: JumpPointSpace; x, y, dir: int): int {.
    ...raises: [PathyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns one precomputed jump distance for debugging or drawing. Source   Edit   
proc linePassable(path: PathSpace; ax, ay, bx, by: int): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc nearestPassable(path: PathSpace; x, y: int; radius = 96): PathStep {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the nearest passable point around a requested point. Source   Edit   
proc newJpsSpace(path: PathSpace): JpsSpace {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a JPS+ path space from an existing path space. Source   Edit   
proc newJpsSpace(walkMask: openArray[bool]; width, height: int;
                 mode = DiagonalPath): JpsSpace {....raises: [PathyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a JPS+ path space over one walkability mask. Source   Edit   
proc newJumpPointSpace(path: PathSpace): JumpPointSpace {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates a JPS+ path space from an existing path space. Source   Edit   
proc newJumpPointSpace(walkMask: openArray[bool]; width, height: int;
                       mode = DiagonalPath): JumpPointSpace {.
    ...raises: [PathyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a JPS+ path space over one walkability mask. Source   Edit   
proc newPathSpace(walkMask: openArray[bool]; width, height: int;
                  mode = DiagonalPath): PathSpace {....raises: [PathyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a direct A-star path space over one walkability mask. Source   Edit   
proc newPathSpace(width, height: int; mode = DiagonalPath): PathSpace {.
    ...raises: [PathyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a direct A-star path space where every point is passable. Source   Edit   
proc newTilePathSpace(path: PathSpace; tileSize = DefaultTileSize): TilePathSpace {.
    ...raises: [PathyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a tile path space from an existing path space. Source   Edit   
proc newTilePathSpace(walkMask: openArray[bool]; width, height: int;
                      tileSize = DefaultTileSize; mode = DiagonalPath): TilePathSpace {.
    ...raises: [PathyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a tile path space over one walkability mask. Source   Edit   
proc passable(path: PathSpace; x, y: int): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns true when a point is inside the grid and passable. Source   Edit   
proc passable(tiles: TilePathSpace; x, y: int): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns true when one tile has a passable representative point. Source   Edit   
proc pathDistance(jps: JumpPointSpace; startX, startY: int;
                  path: openArray[PathStep]): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the movement distance through one JPS+ path. Source   Edit   
proc pathDistance(mode: PathMode; startX, startY: int; path: openArray[PathStep]): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the movement distance through one path. Source   Edit   
proc pathDistance(space: PathSpace; startX, startY: int;
                  path: openArray[PathStep]): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the movement distance through one path. Source   Edit   
proc pathDistance(tiles: TilePathSpace; startX, startY: int;
                  path: openArray[PathStep]): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the movement distance through one tile path. Source   Edit   
proc pathHeuristic(mode: PathMode; ax, ay, bx, by: int): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the movement distance heuristic for one path mode. Source   Edit   
proc pathHeuristic(path: PathSpace; ax, ay, bx, by: int): int {.inline,
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the path-space heuristic between two points. Source   Edit   
proc pathIndex(path: PathSpace; x, y: int): int {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns one flattened path-space index. Source   Edit   
proc pathStepPassable(path: PathSpace; x, y, dx, dy: int): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns true when a unit path step can be taken. Source   Edit   
proc tileIndex(tiles: TilePathSpace; x, y: int): int {.inline, ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns one flattened tile-space index. Source   Edit   
proc update(jps: JumpPointSpace; path: PathSpace) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Replaces the base path space and rebuilds the JPS+ path space. Source   Edit   
proc update(jps: JumpPointSpace; walkMask: openArray[bool]) {.
    ...raises: [PathyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Replaces the base grid and rebuilds the JPS+ path space. Source   Edit   
proc update(path: PathSpace; walkMask: openArray[bool]) {....raises: [PathyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Replaces the path-space grid with a new walkability mask. Source   Edit   
proc update(tiles: TilePathSpace; path: PathSpace) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Replaces the base path space and rebuilds the tile path space. Source   Edit   
proc update(tiles: TilePathSpace; walkMask: openArray[bool]) {.
    ...raises: [PathyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Replaces the base grid and rebuilds the tile path space. Source   Edit  

Iterators

iterator all(path: PathSpace): PathStep {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Iterates all passable points in a path space. Source   Edit   
iterator all(tiles: TilePathSpace): PathStep {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Iterates all representative tile points in a tile space. Source   Edit   
iterator jumpPoints(jps: JumpPointSpace): PathStep {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Iterates all precomputed cardinal jump points. Source   Edit
